demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is jumping all over the place like a fish out of water, and I feel completely washed out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly about four hours ago and hasn't settled — my heart keeps racing and fluttering and I feel dizzy and drained, and I live on my own so I'm a bit frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on abruptly about four hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about four hours and still going
symptom_narrative.character: a fast fluttering, racing feeling in the chest — like my heart is jumping around and won't keep time
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really drained and washed out; the racing is constant and it's making me feel unwell
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started four hours ago, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; resting in bed hasn't stopped it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around — I got short of breath just walking to the bathroom
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: short of breath when I move, lightheaded and a bit dizzy, and very tired; when I feel my pulse it seems fast and like it's skipping
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't remember it ever doing this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've had to stay resting in bed; I feel too dizzy and weak to be up and about

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure for a long time
past_medical_history.how_managed: I take a tablet for it every day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is feeling vulnerable because of the dizziness

objective_data_offered.value: when I put my fingers on my wrist my pulse feels really fast and jumpy, I can't count it properly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own finger-on-wrist impression, not a measured or counted rate

objective_data_offered.value: I have a blood-pressure machine here on the table but I haven't taken a reading yet
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: device present and offered; no reading taken, so no value available
